summary: 9 cartridges with MV=0: 8 Hornady ECX International (velocity intentionally unpublished) + 1 Nosler 300 Wby Mag NoslerCustom (no factory spec found). Down from 104 after curation patches 019-023.
notes: 95 zero-MV cartridges resolved: 5 Federal placeholders deleted (patch 019), 33 Barnes filled (020), 43 Winchester filled (021), 12 Nosler filled (022), 2 Hornady filled (023). Remaining 9 are genuinely unfixable from public sources — Hornady ECX International ballistics chart shows 'See hornady.com for latest information' for all ECX loads.

summary: 17 rifle bullets (diameter <= .375) missing all BC fields, excluding CE, Nosler, and Winchester. Sierra 4, Lehigh 4, Federal 4, Lapua 3, Swift 1, Norma 1. Down from 33 after metadata enrichment patches 028-030.
notes: Sierra 4 are 2026 new products (BCs not yet published). Lehigh 4 are Controlled Chaos bullets (BC not published by manufacturer). Federal 4 are component bullets (Fusion, Trophy Bonded). None are match/LR-critical.

summary: Lapua 100gr Open Tip G580 (id=8e35868b) was reported with diameter=0.264 but is actually a .30 cal (0.308") bullet. The '6,5 g' in the name is weight in grams, not caliber.
resolution: DB already has correct diameter=0.308 and source URL says '30-cal'. QA report was against stale data snapshot.

summary: 90 newly ingested cartridges from Barnes/Winchester/Nosler batch — all resolved via curation patches 020-022. MV data sourced from retailer sites.
resolution: All 90 cartridges populated: 33 Barnes (patch 020), 43 Winchester (patch 021), 12 Nosler (patch 022), 1 Nosler left at zero (no factory spec), 1 already had correct name match in patch 022.

summary: 3 self-loading brand mislinks remain (down from ~8): 1 Hornady 338 Lapua→Sierra, 2 Nosler→Hornady/Barnes. Plus 13 Winchester non-BST cross-mfr links (separate from BST partnership loads).
notes: Self-loading brand mislinks (3): Hornady 338 Lapua 250gr BTHP Match→Sierra (needs manual review), Nosler 223 Rem 55gr SP→Hornady, Nosler 375 H&H 300gr→Barnes. Winchester non-BST cross-mfr (13): includes .223 69gr Match→Hornady, .223 62gr→Hornady, 6.5 PRC/Creedmoor→Nosler/Lapua, Expedition Big Game loads→Nosler, .300 Blackout→Nosler, etc. 11 Winchester BST→Nosler links are expected (Combined Technologies partnership). Patch 031 also fixed BH .223 77gr OTM→Sierra SMK (was incorrectly linked to Berger).

summary: Hornady 30 Cal .308 178gr ELD-X bullet created and all 7 cartridges relinked via curation patch 025.
resolution: 178gr ELD-X bullet created with G1=0.535/G7=0.271 from Hornady product page. All 7 cartridges (4 Hornady Precision Hunter, 2 Federal, 1 BH) relinked. Patch 025.

summary: All 5 missing Hornady bullet variants created and cartridges relinked via curation patch 025.
resolution: Created via patch 025: 178gr ELD-X (G1=0.535/G7=0.271), 165gr CX (G1=0.442/G7=0.220), 129gr SST (G1=0.485/G7=0.249), 120gr CX (G1=0.473/G7=0.237), 117gr InterLock BTSP (G1=0.391/G7=0.195). All affected cartridges relinked.

summary: 3 cartridge BC values outside standard ranges — all verified plausible. .50 BMG 750gr A-MAX G1=1.05 (valid for .50 cal), .22 WMR 30gr V-MAX G1=0.095 (tiny rimfire), .338 Lapua 300gr Elite Hunter G1=0.814/G7=0.417 (heavy .338).
notes: No action needed. These are edge cases that legitimately fall outside the G1 0.1-0.8 / G7 0.05-0.45 typical ranges.

summary: Sako TRG Precision .308 174gr (id=afee55ff) has wrong weight (174gr, should be 175gr) and wrong G1 BC (0.472, should be 0.467)
notes: Curated data from gap-fill session. Multiple retailer sources confirm 175gr Scenar-L HPBT with G1=0.467. Related Sako entries (Powerhead Blade .308 174gr) may also have wrong weight — Sako SPA site prevents direct verification.
